Query.Sql: with sk as ( select distinct Record ->> '$.Skin.SkinCore.SkinCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Skin.SkinCore.SkinCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, Record ->> '$.Skin.SkinCore.SkinCoreDiagnosis.SkinCoreDiagnosisAdditionalItems.SecondaryDiagnosisICD.@code' as SecondaryDiagnosisICD from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'SK' ) select distinct NhsNumber, ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, SecondaryDiagnosisICD from sk where NhsNumber is not null and SecondaryDiagnosisICD is not null and ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis is not null;

Explanation.Description: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED) is the date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: ICD code used to identify the secondary patient diagnosis. Same as the CLINICAL CLASSIFICATION CODE attribute. For Healthcare Operational Data Flows (Acute), this is the next most relevant patient diagnosis.
